headline: Philippines Reasserts Sabah Claim Triggering Diplomatic Crisis
context: Philippines Congress passed resolution reasserting sovereignty claims over Sabah prompting Malaysia to recall ambassador in March 2026.

cards.big: Philippines Congress reasserts Sabah claim prompting ambassador recall
cards.sub: Resolution revives dormant territorial dispute creating diplomatic crisis

cards.big: Resolution passed with 188 of 312 House votes citing 1878 Sulu lease
cards.sub: Malaysia maintains lease was cession and Sabah joined via 1963 referendum

cards.big: Malaysia recalled ambassador and summoned Philippine envoy in KL
cards.sub: Strongest action between countries since 2013 Lahad Datu incursion

cards.big: ASEAN Secretary General called for bilateral dialogue and respect
cards.sub: Other ASEAN members remained silent avoiding taking sides

cards.big: Sabah claim revival tests whether dormant territorial disputes can be permanently resolved
Philippines reasserting Sabah claim in 2026. Historical claims require legal forums, not diplomatic escalation.
